title: Psacalium filicifolium
taxonomy: Psacalium filicifolium is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is a member of the tribe Heliantheae, which includes daisies and sunflowers. This plant is native to Mexico and is also known as the "fern-leaf psacalium." Within the plant kingdom, Psacalium filicifolium is classified as a dicotyledonous perennial herb. Its classification is further broken down into the kingdom Plantae, phylum Magnoliophyta, class Magnoliopsida, and order Asterales.
